privileged_info_summary: The task requires designing a V-Block jig in FreeCAD with precise geometric specifications. The design is a 60mm × 60mm × 40mm rectangular block with a V-groove (90-degree included angle, 12mm deep) on the top face running along the Y-axis, and two rectangular side slots (12mm high, 4mm deep) on opposite faces. The expected final volume is 129,600 mm³ (within 2% tolerance), and output should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/v_block.FCStd. All geometric specifications are mathematically consistent and verified against task description.
